LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Stubgun.label: stubgun
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Stubgun.description: A compact medium range automatic gun designed to be mounted on a battle drone.
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Stubgun.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQE_Bullet_Stubgun.label: stubgun bullet
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_DroneTurret.label: drone turret
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_DroneTurret.description: A refined turret with military-grade stabilization, targeting routines, and hardened casing designed to be mounted on a battle drone.
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_DroneTurret.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQE_Bullet_DroneTurret.label: drone turret bullet
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Rattlegun.label: rattlegun
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Rattlegun.description: A drone-mounted light machine gun, designed for heavy suppression but with low accuracy.
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Rattlegun.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQE_Bullet_Rattlegun.label: rattlegun bullet
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Lance.label: lance
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Lance.description: A single-shot sniper weapon based on an ancient precision rifle design, featuring exceptional range and accuracy at the cost of poor close-range performance.
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_Lance.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQE_Bullet_Lance.label: lance bullet
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_StingrayCannon.label: stingray cannon
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_StingrayCannon.description: A single-shot sniper weapon based on an ancient precision rifle design, featuring exceptional range and accuracy at the cost of poor close-range performance.
LanguageData.VQE_Gun_StingrayCannon.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VQE_Bullet_StingrayCannon.label: stingray cannon projectile
